chancellor_restoration_levy.title: Restoration levy
chancellor_restoration_levy.dialog: The worst soil and timber stands need a levy for restoration. Yields will dip while the land heals.

chancellor_extraction_surge.title: Extraction surge
chancellor_extraction_surge.dialog: Open the reserves for a short surge. The ledger will smile — the land will not.

chancellor_selective_fallow.title: Selective fallow
chancellor_selective_fallow.dialog: Leave the most scarred plots fallow for a fortnight. Output softens; the soil remembers the rest.
